title: lepicephalus attenuatus
side_effects: Lepicephalus attenuatus can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing allergic reactions, which may manifest as skin rashes, itching, or difficulty breathing. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant can lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, diarrhea, and stomach pain. Additionally, improper use of Lepicephalus attenuatus may also cause cardiovascular problems, such as increased heart rate and blood pressure. Furthermore, prolonged exposure to the plant's toxins can potentially lead to kidney or liver damage.
